devdoc.author: RLPWriter is a library for encoding Solidity types to RLP bytes. Adapted from Bakaoh's         RLPEncode library (https://github.com/bakaoh/solidity-rlp-encode) with minor         modifications to improve legibility.
devdoc.title: RLPWriter

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (bytes memory[] memory) pure returns (bytes memory)
